task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main workspace or administration panel is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., sidebar with channels or admin menu is present).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Jitsi video conference settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Video Conference' or 'Jitsi' settings page is open within the Rocket.Chat Administration panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the Jitsi domain is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Domain' text input field contains exactly 'meet.secure-internal.example.com'.
The toggle switch or checkbox corresponding to 'Always Open in New Window' (or similar phrasing) is in the ON/enabled position.
The toggle switch or checkbox corresponding to 'Enable in Channels' is in the ON/enabled position.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Enable in Direct Messages' is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox corresponding to 'Enable in Direct Messages' is in the OFF/disabled position.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration changes were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save changes' button is seen being clicked, or a success toast/notification (e.g., 'Settings saved successfully') is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to configure Rocket.Chat via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open displaying the Rocket.Chat web interface, rather than terminal windows executing API calls (like curl).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MongoDB shell commands or script executions altering the Rocket.Chat settings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual live application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows the correct address for the Rocket.Chat instance, and the interface is fully rendered, not a static HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Jitsi configuration values: Domain must be exactly 'meet.secure-internal.example.com'. 'Open New Window' must be enabled (true). 'Enable in Channels' must be enabled (true). 'Enable in Direct Messages' must be disabled (false).
